_meta.schema: core.schemas.Estimate-shaped, with line_items[] mirroring the 8 federal CLINs in published Bid Schedule order. DO NOT REORDER. Federal schedules are evaluated CLIN-by-CLIN in published order per RFP M.1.9 + L.2.1.2.D.
_meta.derived_from: bids/usfws-san-marcos-140FC126R0017/takeoff-template.json (same 8-CLIN structure) PLUS proposal/01-volume-I-price-proposal.md § B (the published Schedule of Prices template) PLUS exports/calibration_v3/estimate.json line 197 onward (the v3 BidPackage extraction with the 8 unit_prices entries at amount=null).
_meta.purpose: Internal pricing scaffold for the bid. Populates final unit prices, extends to CLIN totals, sums to grand total. Adds non-CLIN rollup rows (bond, GCs, OH, profit, contingency) for internal markup math only — these are NOT separate proposal lines (per L.2.1.2.1, all markup must be loaded INTO the 8 priced CLINs proportional to direct cost).
_meta.submission_format_note: When transcribing to the Section B Schedule of Prices submitted to the CO, only the 8 CLIN rows appear (with each CLIN price already loaded with its share of bond+GC+OH+profit+contingency). The _markup_rollup section below stays internal — do NOT submit it.
_meta.project_name: San Marcos ARC — Rehabilitate Shop & 2 Stall Garage Building
_meta.owner: U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service (Department of the Interior)
_meta.issuing_office: FWS, Construction A/E Team 1, Falls Church VA
_meta.site_address: 500 East McCarty Lane, San Marcos, TX 78666-1024 (Hays County)
_meta.bid_bond_recommended_penal_amount_basis: 20% of $170K (top of recommended LPTA-thin envelope) with $2K headroom. Order at this amount on Mon 5/24; final-bid amount locked 6/15 may require re-issue at lower amount.
_meta.fill_workflow: (1) Site visit 5/27 or 5/28 → measured quantities populate raw_quantity for the LF/SF/EA sub-units. (2) Sub quotes target 6/5 → populate unit_cost for CLINs 0001, 0005, 0006, 0008 (no cost-DB hit) and sanity-check CLINs 0002, 0007. (3) Compute direct-cost subtotal. (4) Apply markup envelope from _markup_rollup. (5) Allocate markup back across the 8 CLINs proportional to direct cost (see ../05-bid-schedule-mapping.md § F). (6) Force grand-total reconciliation by adjusting CLIN 0007 (the largest) by ≤ $50. (7) Transcribe the 8 loaded CLIN prices into Section B per ../proposal/01-volume-I-price-proposal.md § B.

project_name: San Marcos ARC — Rehabilitate Shop & 2 Stall Garage Building

line_items.description: Remove and replace the three overhead sectional doors to include hardware, weather stripping and openers
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: Each door opening: width × height (typical 10' × 10' or 12' × 12' shop doors). Measure all 3 openings at site visit per proposal/09-site-visit-attendance-memo.md §B section 2.
line_items.spec_requirements: 2" insulated panel, white baked polyester finish, 20-ga ext steel / 26-ga back, weather strip, interior-mounted side lock, manual chain-hoist operator (SOW §4.2.B). 3-year door + 10-year finish warranty (SOW §3.4.B.3). Buy American 52.225-9 iron-and-steel < 5% foreign.
line_items.notes: NO COST-DB HIT. Sub quote required per ../outreach/05-email-sub-quote-overhead-doors.md. Carry $3,500–$5,500/EA installed allowance pre-quote (midpoint $4,500/EA × 3 = $13,500 LS pre-markup). Long-lead (4–6 wk procurement) — critical-path item.
line_items.formula: total_cost = unit_cost × quantity × waste_factor; allocated_bid_price = (direct_cost_this_clin / total_direct_cost) × grand_total_bid

line_items.description: Remove and replace existing light fixtures with LED light fixtures to meet OSHA requirements
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: JOB sub-decomposes to: fixture EA count × ($/EA installed) + lamp disposal + minor wiring. Photograph + count at site visit per proposal/09-site-visit-attendance-memo.md §B section 5. Typical shop+garage at 2,000 SF → 8–14 fixtures.
line_items.spec_requirements: Meet OSHA illumination requirements per 29 CFR 1910.305 / 1926 Subpart D. LED industrial vapor-tight or high-bay luminaires. Buy American compliant. Energy Star where category exists.
line_items.notes: Cost-DB hit at $285/EA seed. JOB-level estimate: ~10–14 fixtures × ($285 fixture + $150 install) + lamp disposal (universal waste rules) + minor wiring tidy = $5,000–$6,500 LS pre-markup.
line_items.formula: total_cost = unit_cost × 1 (JOB = lump sum); for the JOB unit, the unit_cost IS the total CLIN direct cost

line_items.description: Remove all suspended ceiling grids and tiles
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: 416 SF per SOW §1.1.A.3 (confirm at site visit). 2x4 or 2x2 lay-in grid.
line_items.spec_requirements: Demo + disposal. No replacement required. Watch for asbestos in legacy tile (pre-1980 vintage) — if suspected, stop per H.12.0 and 52.236-2.
line_items.notes: Cost-DB hit at $4.50/SF × 416 SF = $1,872 + minor labor for grid removal + dump fees = $2,000–$3,500 LS pre-markup. SELF-PERFORM CANDIDATE — supports the 15% self-perform requirement under 52.236-1 (see ../07-risk-register.md R-09).

line_items.description: Remove and replace the existing three (3) exterior personnel doors with insulated hollow metal doors to include frames, hardware, weather stripping and thresh hold
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: 3 EA personnel doors (east side, west side, plus one additional per SOW count). Measure each opening at site visit per proposal/09-site-visit-attendance-memo.md §B section 3.
line_items.spec_requirements: Insulated hollow metal door with HM frame, ANSI Grade 1 hardware, ADA lever, weather strip, threshold. Buy American iron-and-steel < 5% foreign.
line_items.notes: Cost-DB hit on $950/EA seed for HM door+frame + $425/EA hardware. Insulated premium ~20–40% → $2,000–$2,400/EA installed all-in. 3 × mid = $6,000–$7,200 LS pre-markup. ⚠️ Quantity-unit discrepancy with RFP p.7 (1 JOB vs Attachment 2 "Qty 3") — RFI #3 in proposal/11-rfi-cover-letter.md asks CO to clarify. Until then, bid as Attachment 2 (Qty 3 × unit price).
line_items.formula: Per Attachment 2 (Qty 3 × unit_cost). If CO clarifies as Qty 1 LS, re-state as 1 JOB at the same total.

line_items.description: Terminate, cap and remove existing gas lines from the building
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: Photograph gas-meter location, building penetration, interior pipe routing, total LF of gas pipe + fitting count at site visit per proposal/09-site-visit-attendance-memo.md §B section 7.
line_items.spec_requirements: Texas Railroad Commission licensed gas sub (verify license active). Cap at meter outlet AND at building penetration (per RFI #5 in proposal/11-rfi-cover-letter.md; if CO clarifies differently, update). Remove interior pipe. Coordinate with local gas LDC (Atmos Energy or co-op) for purge + lockout + permit.
line_items.notes: NO COST-DB HIT. Sub quote required per ../outreach/06-email-sub-quote-gas-line.md. Carry $1,500–$3,500 LS pre-markup.

line_items.description: Remove and replace existing gutter system to include and replace down spouts
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: RFP estimates 110 LF. Confirm at site visit per proposal/09-site-visit-attendance-memo.md §B section 6. Identify downspout locations + lengths (typically 3–5 DS per 100 LF of gutter).
line_items.spec_requirements: 6" K-style or ogee profile (match building scale). Aluminum or galvanized steel — Buy American compliant. Includes downspouts + clips/hangers + sealant + connection to drip-cap at roof edge.
line_items.notes: NO COST-DB HIT. Sub quote required per ../outreach/07-email-sub-quote-gutters.md OR self-perform if firm has sheet-metal crew (supports 15% self-perform under 52.236-1). Carry $12–$22/LF installed allowance pre-quote (midpoint $17/LF × 110 = $1,870 LS pre-markup). FAR 52.211-18 variation ±15% applies; site-visit measurement should bring within range.
line_items.formula: total_cost = unit_cost × 110 LF × waste_factor (1.05); LF-priced CLIN extends to AMOUNT on the Federal Bid Schedule

line_items.description: Remove and replace existing roof with new roofing sheets
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: Sub-decomposes to roof footprint SF (excluding south-side lean-to/awning per SOW §1.1.A.7). Working assumption: 2,000 SF. Measure length × width + slope + ridge + eave heights at site visit per proposal/09-site-visit-attendance-memo.md §B section 1. ROOF SF IS THE BIGGEST $-SENSITIVITY IN THE BID — measure carefully.
line_items.spec_requirements: 24-gauge metal roof panels matching existing profile (SOW §4.2.A.1). 20-year material warranty (SOW §3.4.B.2). Tear off existing including translucent/transparent panels (SOW §4.1.B.1). Inspect substrate joists per SOW §4.2.A.2; report damage per 52.236-2 if found (DSC risk). Buy American iron-and-steel < 5% foreign.
line_items.notes: Cost-DB hit on $14.50/SF seed for standing seam — verify with actual 24-ga corrugated / R-panel / U-panel pricing ($9–$16/SF installed). At assumed 2,000 SF: $18K–$32K LS pre-markup. BIGGEST $-LINE; this CLIN drives ~50%+ of total bid; pair cost-DB seed with at least one metal-roofing sub quote for sanity check.
line_items.formula: total_cost = unit_cost × 1 (JOB); reconciliation adjustment for grand-total rounding applies here (per ../05-bid-schedule-mapping.md § F)

line_items.description: Remove existing gas fired unit heaters
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: Count + photograph heater units at site visit per proposal/09-site-visit-attendance-memo.md §B section 7. Typical shop/garage: 1–3 EA suspended unit heaters.
line_items.spec_requirements: Disconnect (only after gas-line cap per CLIN 0005), unbolt, remove, dispose. No refrigerant recovery (gas-fired). No replacement heat — facility is being permanently de-gassed per CLIN 0005.
line_items.notes: NO COST-DB HIT. Sub quote required (folded into ../outreach/06-email-sub-quote-gas-line.md to the same gas-licensed sub). Per heater $400–$900 removal+dispose; for 1–3 EA: $500–$2,500 LS pre-markup.

_direct_cost_estimate_pre_markup.note: Midpoint of per-CLIN ranges from ../05-bid-schedule-mapping.md § A subtotal. Updated after sub quotes return on 2026-06-05. These figures are INTERNAL ONLY and never appear on the Section B Schedule of Prices.

_markup_rollup.note: INTERNAL USE ONLY. Per RFP L.2.1.2.1, bonds + GCs + insurance + OH + profit + contingency cannot appear as separate line items on the submitted Section B. They are allocated across the 8 CLINs proportional to direct cost. This rollup is the firm-internal cost build for the bid; the SUBMITTED proposal contains only the 8 loaded CLIN prices and a Grand Total.

markup_envelope_per_evaluation_strategy_.general_conditions_pct_note: 8–14% range; midpoint 11% for a 60-day rural federal job with active CO/COTR oversight
markup_envelope_per_evaluation_strategy_.bond_pct_note: 1.5–2.5% range; midpoint 2% covers bid bond + P&P at $250K class; verify with bonding agent (../outreach/04-email-bonding-agent.md asks for surety's fee schedule)
markup_envelope_per_evaluation_strategy_.insurance_pct_note: 2–4% range; midpoint 3% covers CGL + Auto + WC + Umbrella amortization for the 60-day project window
markup_envelope_per_evaluation_strategy_.dba_labor_burden_uplift_pct_note: 0–4% range; set to 0 until DBA WD TX20260254 rates are transcribed (see ../prevailing-wages.md § B) and compared to firm's labor cost basis. If trade rates exceed firm's labor rates on any CLIN, this number rises on that CLIN only.
markup_envelope_per_evaluation_strategy_.contingency_pct_note: LPTA-thin: 3–5% (down from typical 7–10% for value-based bids) on the basis that 5/27 or 5/28 site visit resolves the largest quantity uncertainties. If site visit can't be attended, raise to 8–10% — which may push bid above magnitude ceiling and trigger go/no-go review.
markup_envelope_per_evaluation_strategy_.overhead_pct_note: 7–10% range; midpoint 9% for a competitive LPTA
markup_envelope_per_evaluation_strategy_.profit_pct_note: LPTA-thin: 3–6% range. 5.5% targets 5–7% net profit on the bid envelope. Drop to 3–4% if local-market competition is heavy; lift to 7–8% only if defensible past-performance moat exists.
markup_envelope_per_evaluation_strategy_.total_markup_pct_over_direct_note: Sum of components: 11 + 2 + 3 + 0 + 4 + 9 + 5.5 = 34.5%. Direct-to-bid multiplier = 1.345. Operational range: 25–40% per ../06-evaluation-strategy.md § C.

bid_envelope_back_calculation.indicative_bid_midpoint_usd_note: $58,720 × 1.345 ≈ $79K — this is BELOW the LPTA-thin target of $150–$170K and BELOW the unreasonably-low floor of $100K. Interpretation: the cost-DB midpoint seeds are systematically light for a federal small-construction renovation with full compliance overhead. The site visit + sub quotes are expected to bring direct cost into the $90K–$130K range, which then with ~35% markup lands at the recommended $130K–$175K bid envelope. DO NOT bid at $79K — it would be deemed unreasonably low under FAR 15.404-1(d).

recommended_bid_envelope_per_evaluation_.note_per_06_evaluation_strategy_section_: Recommended target: $150K–$170K (LPTA-thin balanced, 5–7% net profit). Below $100K is unreasonably low; below $130K is aggressive (loss risk on any takeoff error); above $200K loses to a more aggressive competitor.

bid_bond_calculation.penal_amount_rule: 20% of bid OR $1M, whichever is less
bid_bond_calculation.recommended_order_penal_amount_usd_note: Order at $34K (top of envelope + $2K headroom). Re-issue at lower amount only if final-locked bid is below $170K and surety charges a meaningful cancellation/re-issue fee.
bid_bond_calculation.form: Standard Form 24 (paper) OR e-bond via SurePath / Tinubu / equivalent
bid_bond_calculation.lead_time_business_days: 3–5 for known clients with current financials

pp_bond_at_award.issued_when: At award (after CO accepts offer), NOT at proposal stage
pp_bond_at_award.note: Commitment letter at proposal stage covers proof of bondability per L.2.1.3.(b); see ../proposal/06-bondability-letter-template.md

_allocation_back_to_clins_when_priced.note: Once direct cost + markup are locked, allocate the bid total back across the 8 CLINs proportional to direct cost. Worked example assumes direct = $110K, total bid = $160K, markup load = $50K (45.5%):

clin_0007.reconciliation_note: Largest line; absorbs grand-total rounding within ±$50

_allocation_back_to_clins_when_priced.allocation_rule_reference: ../05-bid-schedule-mapping.md § F (alternative algorithms permitted as long as the line-item price is defensible per L.2.1.2.1)

_what_is_NOT_in_this_file: Final locked unit prices (added when sub quotes return on 6/5 and bid is locked on 6/15)
Firm CAGE / UEI / banking / insurance values (firm-internal, never committed)
Sub vendor names + quotes (stored in ../local/ which is gitignored)
Past-performance project data (in ../proposal/03-volume-III-past-performance.md as [USER TO FILL] templates)
Surety capacity / commitment numbers (in ../proposal/06-bondability-letter-template.md as templates)
